title: 无标题文章
summary: I'm so happy that it says "Unemployed" on there, at least for now. They (politely) declined to put that in the social stuff despite me thinking that it is hilarious.
content: I'm so happy that it says "Unemployed" on there, at least for now. They (politely) declined to put that in the social stuff despite me thinking that it is hilarious.
